calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-07-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff, San Francisco Housing Authority and Defendant, Annetta Richardson and co-Defendant Marsandra appeared in pro per. The case settled per oral stipulation of parties read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
